title: 目標達成の後に・かすかな芽生え

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto, yet to become race-ready, has
been working hard day after day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But will this benefit her in the long run? I need to
make a decision, and soon.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Quietly... without making a sound... Okay, the
coast is clear. All right, time to say my
goodbyes...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I already know... how things are to turn out. I've
been nothing but trouble since my debut.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you've done so much for me. You treated
me kindly, and that made me happy. But now, I
must find a way on my own.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm not forgetting anything, am I? I already put
the leftover snacks and photo frame in my bag...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eek, who's there?! Trainer and... Fukukitaru?!
choice_data_list: Where do you plan on taking all of that?
Where do you plan on taking all of that?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
No, well... I'm not needed anymore, right? So, I
thought I should...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: "Keep"? You don't mean...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?! You mean I can stay?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Of course you can stay, Doto! You've been steadily accumulating good karma.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The gods have their eyes on you! That goes for
your trainer, too.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Ummm... Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've messed up countless times, and yet you've
never given up on me. So, I'll give you double the
effort from here on. Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, we get back to training. Gradually,
I begin noticing a change.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump, thump, thump, thump!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... How was that?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, your form was almost unrecognizable!
Th-this is a harbinger of good comings, no doubt!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Has the time finally dawned upon us?! What was
it called? The...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The pray-ready state!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Race-ready... Does this mean my body is finally
getting stronger?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, I have felt lighter on my
feet recently. Maybe I can start pushing myself
more.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: So... what should be our next goal?
choice_data_list: Shall we try entering the Derby?
Shall we try entering the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huuuh?! The Derby?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-the graded races are scary enough, but G1
races are the scariest of them all!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-w-well if you insist, I'll happily do it. Especially
because I'm r-r-race-ready... now!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Now... Nownownow—Na?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Nyaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Doto, hang in there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She crumbles under the potent mix of enthusiasm
and anxiety. It might be best to save the G1 for
later.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eghh... Sorry about that...
choice_data_list:
Let's focus on building up a bit more
experience.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ye-yeah... I still have a long way to go if just the
name alone makes me panic.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I think you're making good progress,
though. Perhaps, if possessed by the god of
courage...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Physically, she's been showing signs of growth,
but emotionally, she isn't keeping up. It's still best
to hunker down and make gradual progress.
